projects.title: ImageStudioLab
projects.description: Premium AI Infographics Generator built with Next.js and Gemini 2.5 Flash. Transform complex ideas into high-converting, professional vertical infographics in seconds.
projects.longDescription: ImageStudioLab is a state-of-the-art AI Infographics Generator that simplifies complex data and product cataloging into viral, high-converting visual content. Powered by Google's Gemini 2.5 Flash, it offers specialized modes like Topic to Visual and Product Showcase. The platform is designed for creators and businesses who need professional-grade infographics without design skills, featuring a privacy-first architecture, daily credit system, and instant high-resolution exports optimized for all social platforms.
challenges: Integrating Google's Gemini 2.5 Flash for complex layout generation
Ensuring high-resolution output for social platforms
Building a robust credit-based subscription model
achievements: Developed a specialized AI Infographics generation engine
Achieved near-instant generation of professional-grade visuals
Implemented intuitive 'Topic to Visual' conversion workflow
Created a privacy-focused platform with secure user data handling

projects.title: Link4Coders
projects.description: Developer-first bio platform built with Next.js. Create professional developer profiles with GitHub integration, interactive code snippets, project showcases, and skill matrices - all in one link.
projects.longDescription: Link4Coders is a comprehensive developer portfolio platform designed specifically for developers to showcase their work effectively. It features GitHub integration for repository management, interactive code snippets for skill demonstration, beautiful project cards with screenshots and tech stacks, skill matrices for proficiency visualization, and blog integration. The platform offers multiple professional templates including Minimalist Pro, Cyberpunk Terminal, and GitHub Focus themes. Built with a focus on developer experience, it provides seamless project showcasing and professional networking capabilities.
achievements: Built complete developer portfolio platform
Integrated seamless GitHub repository management
Created multiple professional template themes
Implemented advanced project showcasing features

projects.title: IntegratePDF
projects.description: A comprehensive PDF management platform built with Next.js and TypeScript. Features include PDF processing, document workflows, and integration capabilities with various services.
projects.longDescription: IntegratePDF is a powerful PDF workflow automation tool that streamlines document processing. It includes features for PDF manipulation, automated workflows, Google Sheets integration, and webhook support for seamless document management.
achievements: Built comprehensive PDF automation system
Integrated Google Sheets for data management
Implemented robust error tracking with Sentry

projects.title: KlickTape
projects.description: A modern mobile application built with React Native and Expo. Features cross-platform compatibility, real-time functionality, and seamless user experience across iOS and Android.
projects.longDescription: KlickTape is a comprehensive mobile application that leverages the power of React Native and Expo for cross-platform development. It includes advanced features like real-time updates, push notifications, and native device integrations.
achievements: Built fully functional mobile app
Achieved smooth performance on both platforms
Implemented comprehensive notification system

projects.title: AxomPrep (BrainSprint)
projects.description: AI-powered cognitive engine for competitive exam preparation. Master Quantitative, Reasoning, and English with live speed tracking and real-time PvP study rooms.
projects.longDescription: AxomPrep (BrainSprint) is an ultra-fast cognitive training platform designed for competitive exam aspirants. It features AI-powered question generation, real-time speed drift tracking, and a unique PvP Study Room system where users can compete in real-time. The platform includes a Performance Radar that scans session history to detect weak points and conceptual gaps, a global leaderboard with XP multipliers, and advanced formula analysis.
challenges: Developing performance radar for weak point detection
achievements: Created a comprehensive cognitive training platform
Implemented real-time competitive features for students
Developed advanced performance analytics with AI
Built a scalable architecture for thousands of concurrent users

projects.title: Apromax
projects.description: A comprehensive business management platform with admin panel functionality, built using modern web technologies for efficient business operations and management.
projects.longDescription: Apromax is a robust business management solution that includes an admin panel for comprehensive business operations. It features user management, analytics dashboard, reporting tools, and various business automation features to streamline operations.
achievements: Built complete business management system
Improved operational efficiency by 45%
Implemented advanced analytics dashboard
